name: Atlantic Union Bankshares Corporation Depositary Shares each representing a 1/400th ownership interest in a share of 6.875% Perpetual Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series A
summary: Atlantic Union Bankshares Corporation Depositary Shares each representing a 1/400th ownership interest in a share of 6.875% Perpetual Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series A represents preferred equity in Atlantic Union Bankshares. The preferred stock pays a fixed dividend. Atlantic Union Bankshares is a bank holding company headquartered in Richmond, Virginia.
